title: Boqeri
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Boqeri''''' was the practice of ritual exile and pilgrimage in the [[Ulizra]] faith of the [[Nazzar/Legends|Nazzar]]. It was during a ''boqeri'' that [[Ikree]] devised the basis of that religion. After the corruption of her beliefs by the ruling [[Prefect/Legends|praefects]], it is likely that the practice of ''boqeri'' faded away, as it was inconsistent with the [[Speciesism|xenophobia]] dogma of the state. It was still, very rarely, practiced, though many of these mendicants never returned to Nazzri. The future [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qrrrl Toq]] rediscovered the concept of ''boqeri'' when researching the origins of his religion. He decided to follow Ikree's example and explore [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Eventually, his travels brought him to [[Ulda Frav]], where he was convinced to join the Jedi Order.

{{Deity-stub}}
